purpose: Curated emission factors for SmileUp website calculator and future app imports. Each UK factor is traced to a row ID in docs/carbon-footprint-calculator/data.csv (DEFRA Company Reporting 2025).
disclaimer: Factors are averages for reporting and education. Organisation-grade inventories require scope rules, market-based electricity, and supplier-specific data where available.

primary_sources.name: UK Government GHG Conversion Factors for Company Reporting
primary_sources.notes: Numeric values in the CSV use comma as decimal separator. Use rows where Column Text is 'kg CO2e' for total CO2e per unit unless you need gas breakdown.

primary_sources.name: EEA — Greenhouse gas emission intensity of electricity generation (country level)
primary_sources.notes: Download the indicator dataset and import kg CO2e per kWh (or g/kWh) per EU/EEA country. No single row replaces the full DEFRA workbook.

primary_sources.name: European Commission / JRC — GHG emission factors for local energy use (EU data portal)
primary_sources.notes: Use for EU-oriented energy factors; check whether values are activity-based or life-cycle as documented in the dataset.

factors.description: UK electricity: location-based average, total kg CO2e per kWh (includes CO2, CH4, N2O in CO2e).
Transmission and distribution (T&D) losses — UK electricity, additional kg CO2e per kWh consumed. Optional add-on for fuller Scope 3.
Medium car, petrol, per vehicle kilometre (not per passenger). For ride-sharing, divide by average occupancy in your methodology.
Domestic flights to/from UK, average passenger, with radiative forcing (RF) index.
Short-haul to/from UK, economy class, with RF.
Long-haul to/from UK, economy class, with RF.

eu.label: European Union / EEA (import required for electricity per country)
eu.notes: Transport factors below are placeholders for product UX until national EU passenger factors are imported. Do not treat them as UK-equivalent accuracy.

electricity_import_instructions.action: Download EEA indicator data; map ISO country code -> kg CO2e per kWh; paste into electricity_kg_co2e_per_kwh_by_country.

lifestyle_supplementary.description: Annual diet and consumption buckets are not single rows in the DEFRA CSV; keep separate and cite lifecycle literature reviews / national MFA studies when publishing.

vegan.note: Order-of-magnitude annual food-system CO2e; calibrate with chosen study.

vegetarian.note: Order-of-magnitude annual food-system CO2e; calibrate with chosen study.

average.note: Order-of-magnitude annual food-system CO2e; calibrate with chosen study.

meat_heavy.note: Order-of-magnitude annual food-system CO2e; calibrate with chosen study.

low.note: Goods/services footprint proxy; replace with spend-based factors for org use.

medium.note: Goods/services footprint proxy; replace with spend-based factors for org use.

high.note: Goods/services footprint proxy; replace with spend-based factors for org use.

references.name: IPCC AR6 WGIII (lifecycle and mitigation context)
